name: Creamy Ranch Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, process the cottage cheese and yogurt until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a bowl and stir in the chopped onions and seasonings.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to develop.
4. Store in the refrigerator for up to one week. Stir before serving.
Makes approximately 1 2/3 cups. Preparation time: 10 minutes, Chilling time: 30 minutes or longer. Serving size: 3 tablespoons (1/2 cup). Nutrition per serving: 3 grams carbs, 5 grams protein, 1 gram fat, 37 calories. Source: Choice Menus by Marjorie H. Hollands & Margaret Howard, 1993, Canadian Diabetes Association. Comparison: 3 tablespoons of commercial Ranch-style dressing contain 216 calories.
